heading: Notice of seizure
label: 503 Notice of seizure
text: When a forfeiture of a vessel or cargo accrues, the official of the United States Government required to give notice of the seizure of the vessel or cargo shall include in the notice, if they are known to that official, the name and the place of residence of the owner or consignee at the time of the seizure.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)50346 App.:327.R.S. § 4379.
